svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"16_mid_loop_right","label":"Middle right loop","topology":"At mid-distance split off a right route and reconnect it farther toward the castle, forming a clear compact loop on one coherent island.","sockets":["B0","T0"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035}}}
